workflow_rationale: Five parallel planning documents producing Markdown files covering UOM filtering, identity verification, error detection, link field filtering, and ad management system. Although output is documentation-only, the workflow follows feature phases because each document requires codebase investigation followed by structured authoring.

phases.name: Codebase Analysis & Data Gathering
phases.description: Deep-read all referenced DocType JSONs and JS files across all TradeHub apps. Extract field inventories, Link field targets, existing set_query patterns, and UOM usage. This analysis feeds all 5 documents.

subtasks.description: Analyze all logistics DocType JSONs for UOM fields (Shipment, Marketplace Shipment, Shipping Rule, Shipping Rate Tier, Lead Time, Carrier). Extract: fieldname, fieldtype, current options/defaults. Identify which use Select vs Link for units. Also scan Listing and Product DocTypes for weight/dimension fields that may need UOM filtering.

verification.instructions: Verified understanding of all UOM-related fields across logistics and catalog DocTypes

subtasks.notes: Complete UOM field inventory across all logistics, seller, and catalog DocTypes. Found 24 UOM-related fields total: 21 Link→UOM, 2 hardcoded Select (Marketplace Shipment weight_unit/dimension_unit), 1 wrong-type Data (Shipment volume_uom). Critical bugs found: (1) marketplace_shipment.js set_query references wrong field names (weight_uom vs weight_unit) - all 3 calls silently fail, (2) Shipment volume_uom is Data not Link so set_query fails, (3) 12+ Link→UOM fields in seller/catalog apps have no set_query filters at all, (4) default values inconsistent across DocTypes (kg vs Kg, cm vs Centimeter vs Cm), (5) Shipping Rule/Logistics Provider have units hardcoded in labels with no dynamic UOM.

subtasks.description: Scan all DocType JSON files across all 9 TradeHub apps for Link fields. Build inventory of: DocType name, fieldname, target options (Link target), presence of existing set_query in corresponding .js file. This feeds both Task 155 (error detection) and Task 157 (link field filtering).

verification.instructions: Complete Link field inventory compiled from all TradeHub apps

subtasks.notes: Complete Link field inventory: 737 total Link fields across 7 TradeHub apps. 139 (18.9%) have set_query filters, 598 (81.1%) are unfiltered. Key gaps: 125 unfiltered User links (mostly read_only), 79 unfiltered Tenant links, 52 unfiltered Currency links, 40 unfiltered Seller Profile links, 34 unfiltered UOM links, 33 unfiltered Country links, 16 unfiltered Sales Channel links (0% filtered), 9 unfiltered PIM Attribute links (0% filtered). 18 JS files already implement set_query patterns. Full machine-readable inventory at outputs/link_field_inventory.json. Child table filtering detected from 12 parent JS files. ~388 active editable fields need filters, ~95 of which are required fields (critical priority). Committed as 90638dd.

subtasks.description: Read KYC Profile, Seller Profile, Seller Application, Organization DocType JSONs to understand existing VKN/TCKN fields, tax_id_type patterns, and verification workflow status fields. Read Moderation Case for admin review queue pattern.

verification.instructions: Confirmed understanding of existing VKN/TC fields and admin queue workflow patterns

subtasks.description: Read Seller Balance, Seller Balance Transaction, Campaign, Coupon DocType JSONs to understand existing wallet pattern and campaign structure. These are the reference architectures for Ad Wallet and Ad Campaign in Task 158.

verification.instructions: Wallet pattern and campaign structure fully understood and documented for Task 158 reference

phases.name: Write 122.md - UOM Filtering System
phases.description: Create the UOM Filtering System planning document. Covers: DocType field inventory, UOM category definitions, set_query filter patterns, conversion factor logic, and post-implementation steps.

subtasks.description: Write outputs/122.md with all required sections: (1) Overview, (2) DocType/field inventory table showing all UOM-related fields across Shipment, Marketplace Shipment, Shipping Rule, and other relevant DocTypes, (3) UOM category definitions (Weight/Length/Volume/Area/Quantity/Other) with example units per category, (4) Migration plan from Select to Link fields in Marketplace Shipment, (5) set_query filter JS code samples for each field context, (6) UOM Conversion Factor integration plan, (7) Edge cases (custom UOMs, cross-category conversion errors), (8) Post-implementation notes (bench migrate + bench clear-cache).

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (100+ lines)

phases.name: Write 131.md - VKN & TC Identity Verification
phases.description: Create the VKN/TC Identity Verification planning document. Covers: validation algorithms, new DocType design, workflow states, admin review queue, restriction rules, and status badges.

subtasks.description: Write outputs/131.md with all required sections: (1) Overview, (2) VKN validation algorithm (10-digit checksum math), (3) TC Kimlik No validation algorithm (11-digit checksum math), (4) GIB API integration research with fallback strategy, (5) Identity Verification Request DocType design with complete field definitions, (6) Workflow definition (Pending -> Approved/Rejected), (7) Admin review queue design (following Moderation Case pattern), (8) Visual status badges specification, (9) Unverified user restriction rules, (10) Integration points with KYC Profile and Seller Profile, (11) Edge cases (duplicate submissions, expired verification, re-verification), (12) Post-implementation notes.

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (150+ lines)

phases.name: Write 155.md - Popup Error Detection & Fix
phases.description: Create the Popup Error Detection & Fix planning document. Covers: systematic audit methodology, error logging format, priority tiers, common error sources, and remediation strategy.

subtasks.description: Write outputs/155.md with all required sections: (1) Overview, (2) Systematic audit methodology (tools, process, test matrix), (3) Error detection tools (browser console, Frappe error log, bench --verbose), (4) Common error source catalogue (broken Link fields, missing permissions, invalid fetch_from, bad depends_on, JS errors), (5) Error logging format specification (DocType, action, message, source, priority), (6) Priority tier definitions (Critical=form won't open, High=can't save, Medium=field error, Low=cosmetic), (7) Complete DocType audit checklist for all TradeHub apps, (8) Fix ordering strategy (Critical/High first), (9) Regression prevention plan.

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (100+ lines)

phases.name: Write 157.md - Link Field Filtering
phases.description: Create the Link Field Filtering planning document. Covers: complete Link field inventory across all apps, context-aware filter rules per field, implementation method specification.

subtasks.description: Write outputs/157.md with all required sections: (1) Overview, (2) Current state analysis (which Link fields already have set_query, which don't), (3) Complete Link field inventory table (App, DocType, Field, Target DocType, Current Filter, Recommended Filter), (4) Context-aware filter rules per field with specific conditions, (5) Implementation method per field (set_query dynamic vs link_filters JSON static), (6) JavaScript code samples for each filter pattern, (7) Child table Link field filtering (with cascading examples), (8) Edge cases (empty results, circular dependencies), (9) Testing strategy.

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (200+ lines)

phases.name: Write 158.md - Ad Management System
phases.description: Create the Ad Management System planning document. The most complex document with 10+ DocType definitions, auction engine algorithm, fraud detection rules, wallet billing, and dashboard specifications.

subtasks.description: Write outputs/158.md Part 1 - Core DocTypes: (1) Overview and reference platforms (Amazon Ads, Alibaba P4P, eBay Promoted), (2) Ad Campaign DocType (full field list, autoname, status workflow, admin approval), (3) Ad Campaign Item child table (product link, bid, creative), (4) Ad Keyword child table (keyword, match type, bid, negative keywords), (5) Ad Creative DocType (creative types, media rules, approval flow), (6) Ad Placement DocType (slots, dimensions, pricing models, min bid).

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (200+ lines)

subtasks.description: Append to outputs/158.md Part 2 - Engine, Billing & Dashboards: (7) Banner Booking DocType (CPT model, conflict detection), (8) Ad Event Log DocType (impression/click/conversion tracking), (9) Auction engine algorithm (second-price auction, Ad Rank formula, quality_score components, daily budget check), (10) Fraud detection rules (same-IP duplicate clicks <1min, bot filtering, coordinated fraud), (11) Ad Wallet DocType (mirroring Seller Balance pattern), (12) Ad Invoice DocType (monthly billing), (13) Billing flow (per-click deduction, zero-balance auto-pause, minimum balance alerts), (14) Seller dashboard specifications (CTR, ACoS, ROAS metrics), (15) Admin panel specifications (approval queue, revenue summary, fraud alerts), (16) Post-implementation notes.

verification.expected: File exists with substantial content (500+ lines)

phases.name: Final Verification & QA Checks
phases.description: Verify all 5 markdown files exist, have all required sections, proper formatting, and accurate DocType references. Cross-check against spec acceptance criteria.

subtasks.description: Verify all 5 files exist in outputs/ directory. Check: (1) Each file has all required sections per spec, (2) VKN/TC algorithms are mathematically correct, (3) All DocType field references in 158.md use valid Frappe fieldtypes, (4) No code files (.py/.js/.json) were created or modified, (5) Markdown renders correctly (tables, code blocks, headers), (6) Post-implementation notes present where applicable.

verification.command: ls -la outputs/122.md outputs/131.md outputs/155.md outputs/157.md outputs/158.md 2>&1
verification.expected: All 5 files exist with non-zero size

parallel_groups.reason: All depend only on phase-1-codebase-analysis, each writes to a different file (122.md, 131.md, 155.md, 157.md, 158.md) - no file conflicts

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 2x faster than sequential - 5 independent document writes after shared analysis phase

acceptance_criteria: All 5 .md files exist in outputs/ directory
Each file has all required sections per spec.md QA Acceptance Criteria table
VKN validation algorithm is mathematically correct (10-digit checksum)
TC validation algorithm is mathematically correct (11-digit checksum)
All DocType designs in 158.md follow Frappe field type conventions
Ad auction engine uses proper second-price auction logic
No code files (.py/.js/.json/.css/.html/.csv) were created or modified
All documents reference existing TradeHub DocTypes correctly
Post-implementation notes (bench migrate + bench clear-cache) included where applicable
Markdown renders correctly with no formatting errors

verification_steps.name: File existence check
verification_steps.command: ls -la outputs/122.md outputs/131.md outputs/155.md outputs/157.md outputs/158.md

verification_steps.name: No code files modified
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Only .md files in outputs/ and spec metadata files changed

verification_steps.name: Content completeness spot-check
verification_steps.command: grep -c '##' outputs/122.md outputs/131.md outputs/155.md outputs/157.md outputs/158.md

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk - output is documentation only (.md files). No functional code changes. Validation focuses on file existence, section completeness, and content accuracy rather than test execution.

checks: outputs/122.md: UOM categories (Weight/Length/Volume/Area/Quantity/Other) all defined with example units
outputs/131.md: VKN 10-digit validation with proper checksum logic documented
outputs/131.md: TC 11-digit validation with proper checksum logic documented
outputs/155.md: Critical/High/Medium/Low priority tiers with clear criteria
outputs/157.md: Each Link field has exact filter condition (not generic)
outputs/158.md: Ad Rank = bid x quality_score formula with quality_score components
outputs/158.md: IP dedup window and bot detection criteria specified
outputs/158.md: Per-click cost calculation and zero-balance handling documented
outputs/158.md: 10+ DocType designs with complete field lists
